design_philosophy: Utilitarian, clear, and high-performance. The interface is optimized for mechanics operating on mobile devices in potentially poorly lit or bright garage environments. High contrast, large touch targets, and progressive disclosure are essential.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-slate-900
scale.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing for touch targets: p-4 for basic padding, p-6 or p-8 for containers. Inputs and buttons must be at least h-12 for mobile 'fat-finger' tap targets.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Subtle roundness: rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px) maximum. No pill-shaped buttons except for badges. Sharp, industrial feel.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_layout: Asymmetrical bento grid, large typography, high contrast overlapping sections. Generous white space (py-24).
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_layout: Single-column vertical stack on mobile with bottom sticky actions. On desktop, 3 to 4 column grid with strict alignment, tight gaps (gap-4). F-Pattern scanning with primary KPI top-left.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Cardless or minimal cards. Solid white background, 1px border-slate-200, no drop shadows by default. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.

components.navigation: Desktop: Collapsible left sidebar. Mobile: Bottom tab navigation for primary app functions (Home, Add Service, Profile) to allow one-handed operation while working on cars.
components.buttons: Large touch targets. Primary actions in solid Brand Blue (#2563EB). Always explicit text colors on hover. Example: hover:bg-blue-700 hover:text-white.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Labels must be bold and above inputs. Inputs must have clear borders (border-slate-300 focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100). Custom camera capture input for adding services.
components.tables: Dense, cardless style on desktop. On mobile, convert tables to vertical card stacks or swipeable list items with progressive disclosure.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Use 'regular' or 'bold' weights for readability.

hero_landing.description: Mechanic working on a car engine. Use in the hero section of the landing page with a dark slate overlay (bg-slate-900/40) for text contrast.

features_section.description: Male mechanic working under a lifted car. Use to illustrate the 'mobile-first for mechanics' feature.

pricing_background.description: Abstract corrugated industrial surface. Use as an accent background for the pricing or CTA section with high opacity or blend modes.

tenant_registration_bg.description: Red car parked in a garage. Use as a split-screen background image for the login/registration pages.

logos.brand_icon: Wrench or Gear icon from Phosphor Icons used alongside 'AutoGestão' text.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Minimal animations. Fast transitions (150ms) for hover states. Page transitions should be simple fades to maintain a snappy, tool-like feel.
accessibility_and_motion.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., data-testid='add-service-button', data-testid='mechanic-login').
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds. Use dark slate text on light backgrounds and white text on primary buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the app is fully localized in Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR).
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` for all iconography.
Implement the UI primarily for mobile. The mechanic dashboard must look like a native app with large buttons and easy-to-read numbers.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components but override styles to match the 'cardless, dense, industrial' guidelines. Remove excessive borders and shadows.
The 'Add Service' flow is the most critical path for mechanics: make it a 1-click access from the mechanic dashboard. Implement a camera capture or easy file upload for the photo.
For the admin dashboard, ensure the ranking and revenue charts (using Recharts) use the primary and success colors clearly.
When integrating Asaas webhooks and payments, ensure clear feedback states (loading, success, error) for the user.
For file structure, keep all React code in .js / .jsx. Add data-testid to every form, button, and key metric display.
